description: Cargo.lock fixture with one known-malicious crate. `rustdecimal` legitimately matches BOTH the malicious-packages entry (CVE-2022-36315 — typosquat of `rust_decimal` that bundled a Linux credential-stealer payload, see vulnerabilities/supply-chain/malicious-packages/crates.json) AND the typosquat-db `serdee->serde` style row for `rustdecimal->rust_decimal`, so the scanner emits two findings for the same crate. `chrono` is a control entry that should not be flagged (chosen because it is not in the crates typosquat-db target list and so does not trip the typosquat self-match bug documented in pypi-malicious/expected.json).
